content:
Done. Commit `f0bc3518b` pushed to `2181-remove-adminbarwrapper-from-frontend-lay`, updating draft PR #2182. Vercel will redeploy the preview automatically.

**What changed:** removed `AdminBarWrapper` import and JSX from `src/app/(frontend)/layout.tsx` — the login page at `/login` will no longer have the hidden admin bar element in the DOM.
